hero.tagline: Create, share and play your chord sheets.
hero.subtitle: The tool that was missing to organize your repertoire, rehearse and get on stage.

book.title: My book of chord sheets.
book.quote: We know. You've learned dozens of songs. But when it's time to play — the exact chords, the key, the sequence — it's not quite at hand anymore.
book.quoteFooter: That's exactly why the book exists.
book.body: Your book is your personal library. Add your own creations, but also community sheets you're interested in. Your whole repertoire, always within reach — for rehearsing, improvising or getting on stage.
book.item1: Add any public sheet in one click
book.item2: Find your whole repertoire in one place
book.item3: Organize into setlists for every gig
book.item4: Transpose, play, print — without leaving your book

bands.title: Play together.
bands.subtitle: Create a band, invite by link. Share your sheets with every member instantly — whether they're on stage or in class.
bands.musicText: The whole band plays the same version. Share a common repertoire, rehearse with the same chords, get on stage in sync.
bands.musicItem1: One shared repertoire for every member
bands.musicItem2: Everyone gets the sheets in their own book
bands.musicItem4: Synced concert mode to play together
bands.teachersText: You create a sheet, the whole class gets it in their book. By class, by level, by instrument — no more printing or links lost in emails.
bands.teachersItem1: Distribute a sheet to a whole class in one click
bands.teachersItem2: Organize your students into separate groups
bands.teachersItem3: Every student has access without searching
bands.teachersItem4: Students can transpose and play on their own
bands.pricingText: One subscription for the whole band.
bands.pricingSubtext: Teacher, students, musicians — one shared license, not one per head.

features.title: Everything you need to play.
features.subtitle: From creation to the stage, without friction.

editor.title: Visual editor
editor.text: Build your sheet in minutes. Import from Ultimate Guitar or enter it cell by cell.

concert.title: Concert mode
concert.text: Full-screen auto-scroll, adjustable BPM. Play without ever looking away.

transpose.title: Transposition
transpose.text: Change key in one click. Perfect for adapting to the singer or changing capo.

instruments.title: Every instrument
instruments.text: Guitar, piano, ukulele, bass, mandolin — chord diagrams generated automatically.

sharing.title: Sharing & setlists
sharing.text: Publish your sheets, share by link, organize your sets for gigs.

print.title: Clean printing
print.text: Optimized A4 layout with diagrams, repeats and sections — ready in one click.

ai.title: AI recognition
ai.text: Snap a photo of sheet music or a paper chord chart — AI recognizes the chords and builds your sheet automatically.

dictionary.title: Chord dictionary
dictionary.text: Full library for guitar, piano, ukulele and more. Identify a chord by placing your fingers on the fretboard or keyboard.

how.title: Simple from the start.
how.subtitle: Three steps from zero to the stage.

step1.title: Create or import
step1.text: Enter it visually, paste chords from Ultimate Guitar, or snap a photo of sheet music — AI handles the rest.

step2.title: Organize and share
step2.text: Store it in your book, build setlists, transpose. Share with your band or hand it to a whole class in one click.

step3.title: Get on stage
step3.text: Turn on concert mode: full screen, BPM-synced scroll, drum machine. Keep the whole band in sync in real time.

finalCta.title: Ready to organize
finalCta.subtitle: Free, no credit card. Your repertoire online in 2 minutes.

Dashboard.title: My Book
Dashboard.subtitleMineCount: {count, plural, one {# sheet created} other {# sheets created}}
Dashboard.subtitleBookCount: {count, plural, one {# sheet saved} other {# sheets saved}}
Dashboard.emptyBookDesc: Create a sheet or explore ones from the community!
Dashboard.emptyBookmarksDesc: Explore sheets and add your favorites!
Dashboard.emptySetsDesc: Create your first setlist for your gigs!
Dashboard.confirmDeleteSheet: Are you sure you want to delete this sheet?
Dashboard.confirmRemoveBookmark: Remove this sheet from your book?

WelcomeBanner.title: What exactly is this?
WelcomeBanner.body1: Not a music course — more like a logbook for musicians. Jot down the chords and structure of a song (Intro, Verse, Chorus…) for a simplified view and play without searching.
WelcomeBanner.body2: Build your personal book, find your songs at a glance, and share them with other musicians. A chord sheet doesn't replace the score — it reminds you of the essentials.
WelcomeBanner.pillar1Desc: All your songs in one place

Explore.title: Explore
Explore.subtitle: Discover sheets shared by the community
Explore.subtitleUniqueTitles: {count, plural, one {# unique title} other {# unique titles}}
Explore.noResultsHint: This sheet doesn't exist yet — why not create it?
Explore.confirmDeleteSheet: Delete this sheet? This action is irreversible.
